hero.title: Best Ceylon Gems
hero.subtitle: Direct-from-mine sapphires, rubies, and rare stones for discerning jewelers and collectors.
hero.description: Discover the finest gemstones directly from the mines of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka's legendary gem capital

about.title: About Us
about.description: Kamara Selections was founded by two friends: Ralph from Switzerland and Kamal from Sri Lanka. Friends for over 40 years, they built this gem business together with mines in the heart of Rathnapura, known as the 'City of Gems'. Their long-standing partnership and hands-on expertise ensure you receive only the highest quality precious stones.
about.heritageDesc: Built by two friends with 40+ years of trust
about.qualityDesc: Hand-selected gems from our own mines

gemstones.subtitle: Explore our exquisite collection of Sri Lankan gemstones

alexandrite.description: Extraordinary color-changing alexandrite, one of nature's rarest gems
